override.justification: Original M2 scrutiny blockers were resolved by follow-up implementation work: reviewer workbench production changes now exist in useUserStore/embedContextRestore/ReviewPanel, the live ToolManager import path now goes through ReviewSnapshot, and a tracked M2-specific restore bootstrap artifact now exists in repo docs/library/debug_scripts. The remaining full-suite Vitest failures have been reduced to 18 unrelated baseline failures, tracked separately by misc-test-baseline-cleanup-1, so an orchestrator-level override is justified to let M2 user-testing proceed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten review-frontend-worker and review-demo-seed-worker guidance so workers must prove feature completion with production-file changes or explicitly justify when a feature is validation-only/test-only, and keep seed-path references aligned with tracked repo locations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: M2-F1 was marked complete from a test-only commit, and M2-F3 relied on stale review-demo-seed-worker guidance that still points at M6/M7 framing and mismatched script paths.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a library note that commit b0fcabd is only a coverage commit for M2-F1.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is milestone-specific and not durable shared knowledge.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a library note for the import restore entrypoint in ToolManagerPanel.vue.
rejectedObservations.reason: Useful locally for this review, but too implementation-specific to add as broad shared knowledge without orchestrator direction.
